summary: This role is a strong match for your preference for procedural work and provides the predictable daytime hours and remote flexibility you prioritize for a sustainable career. While the high-volume environment and liability pressures result in elevated stress levels, the strict 'log off' policy and lack of on-call duties protect your personal time. It is recommended as a stable option that leverages your cognitive strengths while offering a structured alternative to the physical demands of bedside care.
